code: import axios from'axios';import API_BASE from'../config/api';const API_BASE_URL=API_BASE;class EducationService{getEducationsByCandidate(candidateId){return axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/educations"),{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}addEducation(candidateId,education){return axios.post("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/educations"),education,{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}updateEducation(candidateId,educationId,education){return axios.put("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/educations/").concat(educationId),education,{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}deleteEducation(candidateId,educationId){return axios.delete("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/educations/").concat(educationId),{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}}export default new EducationService();
